# Customer Success — Prompts

| Title | App | Use Case | Difficulty |

| [Team Performance Context](../../_canonical/customer-success-team-performance-context.md) | Cross-App | Gather qualitative team feedback for 1:1s and reviews. Metrics from ticketing system. | intermediate |
